description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs npm install gitbook-cli -g, gitbook fetch latest, and gitbook install for every job. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes gitbook build . public, runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also runs gitbook build . public, runs only on the master branch, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after one week.
